name: Olga Guillot
abstract: Olga Guillot (October 9, 1922 – July 12, 2010) was a Cuban singer who was known as the "Queen of Bolero". She was a native of Santiago de Cuba.

works.t: En el tronco de un árbol

about_quotes.speaker: Candido Camero
about_quotes.evidence: I also accompanied Olga Guillot. First in the Liborio twice and then at the Chateau Madrid four times... always accompanying these big name artists like Celia Cruz and Olga Guillot
about_quotes.doc_title: Candido Camero — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: I knew Olga when she was very young. The time that I was in Havana, I think it was nineteen - early forties, and she was starting because she was singing with a group
